title: Formatting, Style, and Editor Consistency · Independent Template Trial
summary: Create one fast deterministic formatting path for code and configuration. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a zero-diff formatting gate with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose a deterministic formatter and define supported file scope.
Separate local write mode from CI check-only mode.
Use editor-independent whitespace, newline, and charset settings.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
